wines.title: Soundless A Quiet World
wines.quote: Moonlight, oak and one lit window slow the wine to the right pace.
wines.overview: This wine does not arrive loudly. It opens like a second sentence after dusk: dark fruit first, then a softer line of oak, dried flowers and a finish that stays composed rather than forceful.
wines.story: Its narrative begins with the same visual world each time: vine rows under a crescent moon, a house glowing at the end of the path and hands moving through fruit after dark. The estate, the bottle and the music are meant to feel like one sequence.
wines.moodLine: Lower the lights and let the room quieten with the pour.
wines.estateTagline: Moonlight, vine rows and a window left glowing
wines.estateIntro: The estate is not memorable because it is loud. It is memorable because, after dark, everything falls into order: the crescent moon, the lamp, the path and the vines all read as a single composed scene.
wines.estatePhilosophy: The goal is not to present a bottle alone, but a complete sensory frame: first the estate, then the wine, then the music that lets the pour settle into memory.

estateStats.label: Signature Image
estateStats.value: A crescent moon above vine rows

tasting.text: Dark fruit leads, followed by dried petals, light oak and a faint coolness that feels almost nocturnal.
Rounded on entry and measured in its movement, it prefers length and composure over sheer impact.
Clean and slightly mineral, with a quiet trace of wood that suits slow drinking and low-volume music.

technical.label: Style
technical.value: Quiet, rounded, lightly oaked and dusk-toned

technical.label: Best For
technical.value: Solo pours, late conversation and gifting

technical.label: Pairing
technical.value: Aged cheese, lightly charred meat, dark chocolate

technical.label: Music
technical.value: Ambient piano, low strings, restrained jazz

collection.title: Moon Arch
collection.note: The vine corridor is the image that immediately explains why the estate works as an immersive experience.

collection.title: The Lit House
collection.note: A single warm window brings back the estate’s warmth and its sense of story.

collection.title: Night Harvest
collection.note: When people, fruit and moonlight appear together, the brand identity feels complete.

tracks.title: Moonlit Path
tracks.description: A slow opening cue for looking through the estate before the pour.

tracks.title: Harvest Whisper
tracks.description: Closer to the breathing rhythm of vine rows and harvest after dark.

tracks.title: Candle Cellar
tracks.description: Softer and warmer, suited to opening the case and pouring without rush.

tracks.title: Quiet World
tracks.description: The track that lets label, light and pace resolve on a single page.
